title: Eater's Dream
description: Make your fridge finally full with "Eater's Dream" mod!
body:
![Mossball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/301dd80c2bc5ddca2cc5efda479747f444eb2f3f.png)



_Eng_

Improves the aspects of Minecraft related to food by adding and changing the usual diet!


_Rus_

Улучшает аспекты майнкрафта связанные с едой, добавляя и изменяя привычный рацион питания!



[Discord Server which moral help to me!](https://discord.gg/CG9MPCS2)

### Thx!
